# Make Internet UI Great Again (MIUIGA)

> A retro React component library dedicated to reclaiming the internet from minimalist design.

## Documentation
- [README.md](/README.md): Overview, installation, and basic usage.
- [AGENTS.md](/AGENTS.md): Essential rules, implementation conventions, and philosophy for AI agents.
- [MANIFEST.md](/MANIFEST.md): The core vision and design principles of the framework.

## Component Library Reference
- [src/lib/index.ts](/src/lib/index.ts): Main entry point and exports.
- [src/lib/components/RetroProvider.tsx](/src/lib/components/RetroProvider.tsx): Theme and state management.
- [src/lib/components/Layout/Frameset.tsx](/src/lib/components/Layout/Frameset.tsx): Responsive frame layout.
- [src/lib/components/DitherShadow.tsx](/src/lib/components/DitherShadow.tsx): 1-bit stippled shadow system.
- [src/lib/utils/colors.ts](/src/lib/utils/colors.ts): Web-safe color snapping logic.

## Resources
- [Full Context](/llms-full.txt): Complete project documentation in one file.
